info.name: Todo API

item.name: Task Operations

request.description:
Creates a task for the authenticated user.

Authentication: Bearer JWT.

Body:
- title (string, required)
- description (string, optional)

Returns 201 on success.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description:
Returns authenticated user's tasks.

Authentication: Bearer JWT.

Query:
- status: pending|done (optional)
- page: integer >=1
- limit: integer >0

response.name: 200 Ok

request.description:
Returns a task by ID.

Authentication: Bearer JWT.

Path:
- task_id: positive integer.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description:
Deletes a task.

Authentication: Bearer JWT.

Path:
- task_id: positive integer.

Updates a task.

Authentication: Bearer JWT.

Path:
- task_id: positive integer.

Body:
- title (required)
- description (optional)
- status: pending|done

response.name: 200 OK

request.description:
Generates a task description using Gemini AI.

Authentication: Bearer JWT.

Body:
- title (required)

response.name: 200 OK

item.description: Endpoints for managing authenticated user's tasks.

item.name: Auth

request.description:
Creates a new user account.

Authentication: Public

Request Body:
- name (string, required): User's full name.
- email (string, required): Valid email address. Must be unique.
- password (string, required): Minimum 6 characters.

Responses:
- 201 Created: User registered.
- 400 Bad Request: Validation failed.
- 409 Conflict: Email already exists.

Authenticates a user and returns a JWT access token.

Authentication: Public

Request Body:
- email (string, required)
- password (string, required)

On success, the collection automatically stores data.token into {{access_token}}.

originalRequest.description:
Authenticates a user and returns a JWT access token.

Authentication: Public

Request Body:
- email (string, required)
- password (string, required)

On success, the collection automatically stores data.token into {{access_token}}.
